condition: dashboard contract exposed persistent runtime duration guard in code but existing dashboard artifacts lacked the new field, and blocked source reports could be misread as stub-only display evidence
impact: operator could miss that persistent runtime remains estimate-only, not observed long-run evidence; stale dashboard_shell artifacts could fail runtime schema validation
fix: dashboard now shows persistent runtime status as display-only, blocks source status drift, tests negative cases, and migrates runtime dashboard_shell artifacts with valid hashes
